The '''Imperial Engineers Academy''',<ref name="GG9">''[[Galaxy Guide 9: Fragments from the Rim]]''</ref> also known as the '''Imperial Engineering Academy''',<ref name="Blaze">{{JournalCite|8|Blaze of Glory (short story)}}</ref> was a prestigious [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] engineering school. <ref name="GG9" />

The Empire required that all graduates of the Academy receive biannual certification from the prestigious [[Institute of Starship Engineers]].<ref name="GG9" />

==History==
Sometime between the [[Declaration of a New Order|formation]] of the Galactic Empire in [[19 BBY/Legends|19 BBY]] and the [[Occupation of Biitu|occupation]] of the planet [[Biitu]] in [[15 BBY/Legends|15 BBY]], a team of brilliant scientists from the Imperial Engineers Academy, at [[Terrinald Screed/Legends|Terrinald Screed's]] order, was directly responsible for the revival of the [[Abominor]] known as the [[Great Heep]] at the [[Braltzamir Museum of Antiquated Machinery]] on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]].<ref name="Droids">{{SW|url=news/the-droids-re-animated-part-2|series=The Droids Re-Animated|text=Part 2|nolive=1}}</ref>
